name: Paula Cole
abstract: Paula Dorothy Cole (born April 5, 1968) is an American singer and songwriter. After gaining attention for her performances as a vocalist on Peter Gabriel's 1993–1994 Secret World Tour, she released her first album, Harbinger, which suffered from a lack of promotion when the label, Imago Records, folded shortly after its release.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Chris Botti
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Roger Kellaway
about_quotes.evidence: So it’s a duet with Paula Cole. She came in and sang beautifully... I recorded with Paula Cole on Sammy Cahn.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roger Kellaway interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999
